cross_scene_arcs.title: The Shattering of a Marriage
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cal's marriage collapses in stages—from sudden announcement to emotional withdrawal, betrayal, and final separation—marking a complete disintegration of trust and connection with Tracy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cal believes his marriage is stable and predictable.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cal physically leaves the family home, accepting the end of his marriage.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The emotional wounds between Cal and Tracy remain unhealed, and their estrangement persists without closure.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Grief to Reinvention
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cal transitions from shock and passivity to active self-reinvention, pursuing a new identity through physical transformation, social confidence, and romantic conquests.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cal is emotionally shattered and physically injured after jumping from a moving car.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cal appears confident and sexually successful, having fully embraced a new persona.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His reinvention may be superficial, masking unresolved grief and a desire to make Tracy jealous rather than genuine self-acceptance.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Illusion of Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cal struggles to maintain control over his narrative—balancing professional image, parental responsibility, and personal transformation—only to have it unravel in public when his past actions are exposed.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cal attempts to manage his emotional collapse while planning how to tell his children and mother about the divorce.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cal is publicly humiliated and rejected by Tracy after Kate exposes his manipulative behavior.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The truth of Cal's actions remains ambiguous, and his attempts at redemption go unheard, leaving his integrity and future in doubt.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Isolation and Abandonment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cal's support systems erode as he is abandoned by friends and left alone in spaces that once symbolized connection, culminating in his emotional isolation mirroring Jacob's earlier loneliness.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cal is publicly abandoned by Bernie due to Claire's ultimatum, losing a key friendship.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cal sits alone at the bar in the spot once occupied by Jacob, embodying the same isolation and emotional displacement.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Cal has no clear support network, and his emotional stagnation suggests a cycle of loneliness without resolution.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Lingering Hope for Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Despite outward transformation, Cal remains emotionally tethered to Tracy, silently participating in deceptions and clinging to moments of contact, even as new romantic possibilities emerge with Jessica.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cal tries to reassure his children while navigating his new life, still emotionally tied to the family unit.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cal witnesses Tracy's deception but complies, while simultaneously becoming the object of Jessica's romantic advance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: It remains unclear whether Cal will pursue a new relationship with Jessica or continue longing for Tracy, leaving his emotional future in limbo.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Unraveling of Trust and the Collapse of Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tracy's attempts to reconcile or reestablish emotional connection with Cal are repeatedly undermined by mutual betrayals—first her confession of infidelity, then Cal's revelation of multiple affairs. What begins as a bid for honesty and connection collapses into irreversible rupture after Cal's history is exposed, culminating in Tracy's definitive emotional break.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tracy confesses her affair hoping for emotional release and a possible path to reconciliation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tracy rejects Cal completely upon learning of his extensive infidelity, marking the end of any hope for marital restoration.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The cycle of mutual betrayal leaves both characters emotionally isolated, with no resolution on whether forgiveness or co-parenting peace is possible.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Emotional Detachment to Tentative Renewal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tracy's journey traces a path from cold announcement of divorce to emotional withdrawal, failed reconciliation attempts, and eventual symbolic closure—removing the photo of her and Cal—before a fragile, ambiguous moment of connection resurfaces at the end, suggesting emotional complexity persists beyond finality.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tracy announces the divorce with composure, emotionally detached and in control.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tracy acknowledges past chaos but shares a hopeful, lighthearted moment with Cal, indicating potential for renewed connection despite unresolved problems.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether this moment signifies true healing or temporary nostalgia remains unclear, leaving Tracy's emotional future ambiguous.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Struggle for Emotional Acknowledgment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tracy repeatedly seeks emotional validation from Cal—first for her decision to leave, then for her confession, and later for her existential pain—but is met with silence, deflection, or performative disconnection. This pattern underscores a core conflict: her need for acknowledgment versus Cal's emotional unavailability.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tracy demands a reaction from Cal after announcing the divorce, seeking confirmation that her decision matters.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tracy fabricates a call to test Cal's attentiveness, revealing her ongoing need for connection despite emotional distance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Cal never fully engages with Tracy's emotional needs, leaving her longing unmet and their communication fundamentally broken.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Navigating New Romantic Possibilities Amid Guilt and Grief
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After the divorce, Tracy cautiously explores a relationship with David, wrestling with guilt over her past marriage and uncertainty about her readiness. Though she takes steps forward—accepting a second date and ignoring Cal's call—her emotional hesitation and external judgments reveal the fragility of this new beginning.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: David confesses his feelings, forcing Tracy to confront her emotional unavailability.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tracy agrees to another date with David but is emotionally destabilized by Jessica's judgment, revealing her internal conflict between moving on and staying tied to the past.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Tracy's weak smile and lingering doubts suggest she has not fully committed to David or released Cal, leaving her romantic future uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Public Exposure and the Erosion of Privacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tracy's private marital breakdown becomes increasingly public—from office gossip to a school hallway outburst—eroding her control over the narrative. As Cal is socially dismantled and she is symbolically replaced in the household, Tracy's status shifts from wife to marginalized figure, only slowly reclaiming agency through quiet acts of closure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: The divorce becomes office news, stripping Tracy of privacy and emotional control over the narrative.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tracy observes Cal's public emotional plea at graduation from a distance, now part of a restructured family unit that excludes him, signaling her adaptation to a new social reality.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Tracy's perspective remains underrepresented in public moments, and her emotional journey continues to be overshadowed by Cal's dramatics and others' judgments.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Spark of Attraction
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob initiates a subtle yet charged romantic connection with Hannah, beginning with a silent toast and escalating to a direct, flirtatious confrontation that disrupts social norms and establishes mutual tension.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jacob is an observed but unacknowledged presence in Hannah's space, projecting confidence and quiet interest.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hannah outwardly resists but does not reject Jacob, leaving the door open for future engagement despite her denial of attraction.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The authenticity and depth of Hannah's response to Jacob remain ambiguous, leaving their romantic trajectory uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Rival to Mentor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob evolves from a symbol of Cal's inadequacy and romantic rival into an active mentor who intervenes in Cal's life, initiating a transformational relationship rooted in control, authority, and ambiguous intent.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cal views Jacob as an unattainable ideal and source of personal shame, defined by success, desirability, and emotional detachment.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cal accepts Jacob's offer to transform him, marking a shift from passive envy to active dependence on Jacob's guidance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jacob's true motivations—whether altruistic, narcissistic, or performative—remain unclear, casting doubt on the integrity of the mentorship.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Transformation Project
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob undertakes a systematic project to reconstruct Cal's identity, beginning with fashion and expanding to grooming and social behavior, asserting control over every aspect of Cal's self-presentation and worldview.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cal is emotionally broken, socially inept, and visually disheveled, representing everything Jacob claims to oppose.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cal achieves a physical transformation and even secures a romantic connection, but remains emotionally vulnerable and dependent on Jacob's framework.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The transformation prioritizes image over inner growth, raising questions about whether Cal has gained empowerment or merely exchanged one form of insecurity for another.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Jacob's Emotional Unraveling
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob confronts his emotional defenses as his relationship with Hannah progresses, moving from detached flirtation to genuine vulnerability, culminating in a full emotional surrender to love.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jacob operates under a philosophy of emotional detachment, using charm and control to manage intimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jacob fully acknowledges his love for Hannah, abandoning his resistance to emotional closeness and embracing vulnerability.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Despite his surrender, Jacob's ability to sustain intimacy and navigate the complexities of a committed relationship remains untested.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Integration and Acceptance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob transitions from an outsider and disruptor to a legitimate, respected member of Hannah's family, facing hostility and threat before ultimately earning acceptance and symbolic integration.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jacob is preparing to meet Hannah's mother, stepping into a role that demands emotional maturity and social legitimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jacob withstands Cal's violent outburst with composure and earns reluctant respect, solidifying his place as a stable, accepted figure in the family.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term stability of Jacob's position remains fragile, contingent on continued emotional resilience and the endurance of his relationship with Hannah amid familial tension.
